_note: Shared, agreed game terms. BOTH peers must hold a byte-identical copy; the pre-game signature exchange refuses to play on any mismatch. This overlays the private per-peer game.toml. Book: Appendix F.

board_and_agents._axis_note: Negotiated coordinate system both peers agree on. axis_origin_corner = where cell (0,0) sits: top-left|top-right|bottom-left|bottom-right (default top-left). axis_start_index = the first index of each axis (default 0).

world._note: The real-world area the game is set in (e.g. 'New York', 'Manhattan', 'London'). Drives the location-based landmarks in the trash-talk hints. Default empty string = generic landmarks. Agreed & signed term.
world._hint_max_words_note: Hard cap on the number of words in each trash-talk hint sent across the wire (both template and LLM providers obey it; the LLM is also told the limit in its system prompt). Agreed & signed term; this simulator uses 15.
